profile.name: Aditya Kumar Seth
profile.title: Business-Minded Technology Leader / SRE Engineering Manager
profile.tagline: 19+ years turning technical infrastructure into high-yield business assets.
profile.hook: I love optimizing systems. I have saved over $30M/year on infrastructure by measuring and driving optimizations based on resource usage on cloud and on-prem.
profile.availability: Open to Site Reliability Engineering leadership roles in Europe

highlights: Lead teams managing one of the world's largest MySQL infrastructures with strict SLOs and SOX, PCI, and PII compliance at scale.
Drove AI-led automation and FinOps discipline during cloud migration, delivering $30M+/year infrastructure savings.
Cut on-demand AWS costs to less than half of initial forecasts by treating cost as a first-class architectural pillar.
Scaled SRE teams and hiring across Amsterdam and Bangalore COE.
Led the tech team building Dynamic Delivery Pricing for goods across all Delivery Hero brands.
Delivered a high-performance Java/Kotlin service on Kubernetes and AWS serving 40+ countries.
Owned pricing strategy infrastructure with React frontends and strict latency requirements.
Built geolocation and Time Predictions services handling 1M+ requests/min at ~15ms latency.
Engineered integration platforms for major restaurant chains using Python, PostgreSQL, and AWS.
Drove site optimization, automation, and API-based third-party integrations at scale.
Built backend services with PHP/Phalcon following SOLID principles.
Optimized site performance with Memcache, Vagrant, and cross-cultural team delivery.
Led tech team through responsive site launch and mobile site implementation.
Set up CDN, staging/live deployment pipelines, and live server monitoring.
Drove front-end optimization and code review standards.
Architected e-commerce platform with Solr faceted search and MySQL optimizations.
Managed backend performance, CDN setup, and MVC frameworks (Zend, Yii).
Mentored junior developers and owned staging-to-production delivery.
Managed website and server infrastructure for TLBB mobile apps.
Architected FAvision, an analytical web tool for Kasina LLC.
Led AWS server management, database optimization, and front-end performance improvements.
Drove team management and technical leadership across enterprise software projects.
Developed and optimized naukri.com and firstnaukri.com on the LAMP stack.
Delivered high-traffic recruitment platform features at scale.
Developed and tested Flexcube, Oracle's flagship core banking product.
Worked on enterprise-grade banking solutions for global financial institutions.
